productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Unisex ST SW Bag Olive Backpacks
description: The heritage line of adidas, the adidas originals, brings to you this Star Wars inspired bag. The funky distressed print of the space ship coupled with the branding in rubber print on the front pouch makes this a must have in the casual wardrobe of those who love the warriors of the sky!Made of 100% polyester for durability and easy maintenanceMain zippered compartment with a padded slot to hold a small laptop and a sleeve that creates space to hold accessoriesOne zippered compartment on the front with branding in rubber print and an appliqued collections badgeCollection print on the upper in the frontPadded back for laptop safety and carrying easeAdjustable padded shoulder straps for carrying easeCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
